title: Home
welcome: Innovations and Future Trends in Communications and Computer Science
Иновации и бъдещи тенденции в комуникационните технологии и компютърните науки
desc:
Welcome!
We are pleased to welcome you to the first edition of the international conference "Innovations and Future Trends in Communication Technologies and Computer Science" at the South-West University "Neofit Rilski".

The conference is organized on the occasion of three significant jubilees:
50 years of South-West University "Neofit Rilski"
10 years of the Technical Faculty
10 years of the Department of Communication and Computer Engineering and Technologies

With this first edition, we are setting the beginning of a scientific forum where scientists, researchers, PhD students, students, and pupils will have the opportunity to present current results, discuss the present development of communication technologies and computer science, and together analyze future trends, because we believe that as Alan Kay said:
"The best way to predict the future is to create it."

We look forward to seeing you in Blagoevgrad.
